title: ‘Why Are You Troubling MPs?’: Kiren Rijiju Hits Back At Jairam Ramesh After 73 Opposition MPs Sign Notice To Remove CEC Gyanesh Kumar
description: 73 opposition Rajya Sabha MPs submitted a fresh notice seeking CEC Gyanesh Kumar’s removal for “proven misbehaviour”, Kiren Rijiju hit back, saying constitutional authorities can’t be intimidated, citing India’s independent judiciary.
